final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: UI-design-system
Asset type: design system components, multi-device mockups
Primary request: classic minimalist tech-style UI design system including web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls
Scene/backdrop: clean workspace environment with subtle grid patterns, floating component showcase
Subject: comprehensive UI component library - dashboard layout with data visualization, mobile app screens, modular cards, CTA buttons, input controls, toggle switches, navigation elements
Style/medium: modern UI/UX design, glassmorphism accents, subtle gradients, crisp vector graphics
Composition/framing: multi-panel layout showing component variations, organized grid system, device mockups with perspective
Lighting/mood: soft ambient glow, subtle rim lighting on components, futuristic and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy blue + electric cyan + soft white + charcoal gray + subtle purple accents
Materials/textures: frosted glass effects, smooth matte surfaces, subtle noise texture, clean sans-serif typography
Constraints: maintain visual consistency across all components, keep hierarchy clear and scannable
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures, cluttered layouts, excessive decoration, drop shadows that look dated
